card.name: Elixir [Token] ARTF
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
(Elixirs provide LL. When an Elixir is used to use a transcend or attack ability, reserve a card from your discard pile.)

card.name: Inkwell
card.text:
Artform: Writing
(Inkwells provide I.) A deck can have any number of cards named Inkwell.

card.name: Theater Mask
card.text:
Artform: Theater
(You may have Masks enter as a ComedyMask or TragedyMask. Swap them at the start of your turn. ComedyMasks provide {C}. TragedyMasks provide {T}.) A deck can have any number of cards named Theater Mask.

card.name: Music Note
card.text:
Artform: Music
(MusicNotes provide {N}. As you reserve a MusicNote, you may turn it face up as a composed note.) A deck can have any number of cards named Music Note.

card.name: Potion
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
(Potions provide L. At normal speed, you may destroy three Potions you control to create an Elixir token.) A deck can have any number of cards named Potion.

card.name: Actorialle
card.text:
Artform: Theater
{C}{C}: Actorialle transcends 1. If it has transcended already this turn, it transcends 2 instead. {T}{T}: Actorialle attacks 1. If it has transcended this turn, it attacks 2 instead.

card.name: Aggressivoid
card.text:
Artform: None
Aggressive {A}{A}{A}{A}: Aggressivoid transcends 2. {A}{A}: Aggressivoid attacks 1.

card.name: Antagonor
card.text:
Artform: Writing
Aggressive {A}I: Antagonor transcends 1. {A}I: Antagonor attacks 1. {A}{A}II: Antagonor attacks 2.

card.name: Anticipact
card.text:
Artform: None
As long as their are three or more mediums attached to Anticipact, cards all players play have reactive. {A}{A}: Anticipact transcends 1. {A}{A}: Anticipact attacks 1.

card.name: Ascendighoul
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
Whenever another creation perishes, if there are three or more mediums attached to Ascendighoul and at least one of them is a Potion or Elixir, Ascendighoul transcends 1. {A}L: Ascendighoul attacks 1. {A}{A}LL: Ascendighoul attacks 2.

card.name: Ascendivoid
card.text:
Artform: None
Ascendant {A}{A}: Ascendivoid transcends 1. {A}{A}{A}{A}: Ascendivoid attacks 2.

card.name: Banneroar
card.text:
Artform: Writing
{A}{A}II: Each other creation you control transcends 1.

card.name: Blessink
card.text:
Artform: Writing
I: Another creation you control transcends 1. {A}{A}I: Blessink and another creation you control each transcend 1. {A}I: Blessink attacks 1.

card.name: Blessivoid
card.text:
Artform: None
{A}{A}: Another creation you control transcends 1. {A}{A}{A}: Another creation you control transcends 2. {A}{A}{A}: Blessivoid attacks 1.

card.name: Calculaw
card.text:
Artform: Writing
Only one Transcendence counter may be put on each creation per turn. {A}I: Calculaw transcends 1. {A}I: Calculaw attacks 1.

card.name: Comedeus
card.text:
Artform: Theater
When Comedeus enters your field, trigger the start of turn abilities of each TragedyMask you control. {C}{C}{C}: Comedeus transcends 1, then create a Tragedeus token and move all Transcendence counters from Comedeus to the created token. Destroy Comedeus.

card.name: Comedeus [Token] ARTF
card.text:
Artform: Theater
When Comedeus enters your field, trigger the start of turn abilities of each TragedyMask you control. {C}{C}{C}: Comedeus transcends 1, then create a Tragedeus token and move all Transcendence counters from Comedeus to the created token. Destroy Comedeus.

card.name: Composivoice
card.text:
Artform: Music
At the end of your turn, if you have two or more composed notes, Composivoice transcends 1. {A}{N}: Composivoice attacks 1.

card.name: Consumptoad
card.text:
Artform: Writing
I: As a cost to activate this ability, destroy any number of mediums attached to Consumptoad. Consumptoad transcends 1 for each medium destroyed this way. {A}I: Consumptoad attacks 1.

card.name: Curtainyx
card.text:
Artform: Theater
{C}{C}: Curtainyx transcends 1. {C}{C}{C}{C}: Curtainyx transcends 2. {T}{T}: Curtainyx attacks 1.

card.name: Doublix
card.text:
Artform: Writing
If you would create one or more tokens, you may create that many plus one of those tokens instead. I: Another creation you control transcends 1.

card.name: Drummaton
card.text:
Artform: Music
{A}{N}: You may reserve a MusicNote card from your discard pile. If you do, Drummaton transcends 1. {A}{A}{N}: You may reserve two MusicNote cards from your discard pile. If you do, Drummaton and another creation you control each transcend 1.

card.name: Exitask
card.text:
Artform: Theater
{C}{C}: Exitask transcends 1. {C}{C}{C}{C}{C}: Exitask and another creation you control each transcend 1. and Discard two cards, then draw two cards. {T}{T}{T}: Exitask attacks 1.

card.name: Flittercrew
card.text:
Artform: Theater
{C}{C}: Another creation you control transcends 1. {C}{C}{C}: Another creation you control transcends 1. You may trigger the start of turn ability of a TragedyMask.

card.name: Ghoulog
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
{A}{A}LL: Ghoulog transcends 1, then attacks X, where X is the number of Transcendence counters on it.

card.name: Glamora
card.text:
Artform: Theater
{C}{C}: Glamora transcends 1. Move up to one Transcendence counter from another creation you control onto Glamora. {T}{T}: Glamora attacks 1.

card.name: Golemouth
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
{A}{A}L: Golemouth transcends 1. You may destroy a medium or creation you control. If you do, Golemouth transcends 1 again. {A}{A}{A}LL: Golemouth transcends 2. {A}L: Golemouth attacks 1.

card.name: Golochet
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
{A}L: Golochet transcends 1. {A}{A}{A}L: Golochet transcends 2. {A}{A}L: Destroy any number of mediums and/or creations you control. Golochet attacks X, where X is the number of permanents destroyed this way.

card.name: Impyre
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
{A}L: Impyre transcends 1. Put the top card of your deck into your discard pile. {A}{A}{A}LL: Impyre transcends 2. Put the top three cards of your deck into your discard pile. {A}L: Impyre attacks 1. If a creation didn't perish from that attack, reserve a card from your discard pile.

card.name: Inkeye
card.text:
Artform: Writing
{A}I: Inkeye transcends 1. Look at the top card of your deck. You may put it on the bottom of your deck. {A}{A}II: Inkeye transcends 2. Draw a card.

card.name: Inkidrain
card.text:
Artform: Writing
{A}{A}I: Inkidrain transcends 1. Draw a card. {A}{A}{A}II: Inkidrain transcends 1. Draw a card. Each opponent discards a card. {A}{A}I: Inkidrain attacks 1. Each opponent discards a card.

card.name: Leadette
card.text:
Artform: Theater
Whenever one or more Transcendence counters are put on Leadette from an ability of another creation, put a Transcendence counter on Leadette for every second ComedyMask attached to it. {T}{T}: Leadette attacks 1.

card.name: Lichisect
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
{A}{A}{A}LLL: Lichisect transcends 1 and attacks 1. This turn, whenever a creation you control uses an ability that would cause it to transcend and attack, copy that ability.

card.name: Loudeling
card.text:
Artform: Music
At the end of your turn, if you have two or more composed notes, Loudeling attacks 1. {A}{N}: Loudeling transcends 1. {A}{A}{N}: Loudeling transcends 1. You may put a card from your reserves into your hand.

card.name: Maskraft
card.text:
Artform: Theater
{C}{C}: Maskraft transcends 1. You may trigger the start of turn ability of a Tragedy. {C}{C}{C}{C}: Maskraft and another creation you control each transcend 1. Put up to one Mask from your hand into your field.

card.name: Necrestore
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
Whenever you destroy a creation you control, at end of turn, if there are three or more mediums attached to Necrestore, create a token that's a copy of the destroyed creation. L: Another token creation you control transcends 2.

card.name: Noterat
card.text:
Artform: Music
{A}{A}{N}: Noterat transcends 1. Put a card from your reserves into your hand. {A}{A}{N}: Noterat attacks 1. Reserve up to two cards from the top of your deck.

card.name: Pactithorn
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
{A}L: You may discard a card. If you do, Pactithorn transcends 1. {A}{A}{A}L: You may discard a card. If you do, Pactithorn transcends 2. {A}{A}L: Pactithorn attacks 1.

card.name: Protagonor
card.text:
Artform: Writing
Ascendant {A}I: Protagonor transcends 1. {A}{A}II: Protagonor transcends 2. {A}I: Protagonor attacks 1.

card.name: Puppetear
card.text:
Artform: Theater
{C}: Puppetear transcends 1. You may trigger the start of turn ability of a ComedyMask. {C}{C}{C}{C}{C}: Puppetear transcends 2. {T}: Puppetear attacks 1. You may trigger the start of turn ability of a TragedyMask. {T}{T}{T}{T}{T}: Puppetear attacks 2.

card.name: Rhythmaster
card.text:
Artform: Music
{A}{N}: Another creation you control transcends 1. {A}{A}{A}{N}{N}{N}: Another creation you control transcends 1. Draw a card for each of your composed notes. {N}: Rhythmaster attacks 1.

card.name: Rhythmoss
card.text:
Artform: Music
{A}{N}: Rhythmoss transcends 1. If you have two or more composed notes, Rhythmoss transcends 2 instead. {A}{A}{A}{N}{N}: Rhythmoss transcends 2. {A}{N}: Rhythmoss attacks 1.

card.name: Roosterror
card.text:
Artform: Writing
As long as there are four or more mediums attached to Roosterror, if another creation you control would deal damage to a creation, it deals that much damage plus 1 instead. {A}I: Roosterror transcends 1. {A}I: Roosterror attacks 1.

card.name: Slaughtrestage
card.text:
Artform: Theater
{T}{T}: Slaughtrestage transcends 1. You may trigger the start of turn ability of a Comedy. {T}{T}{T}{T}: Slaughtrestage and another creation you control each attack 1.

card.name: Songuard
card.text:
Artform: Music
The first time Songuard would take damage each turn, if you have two or more composed notes, Songuard doesn't take that damage. {A}{N}: Songuard transcends 1. {A}{A}{A}{N}: Songuard transcends 2. {A}{A}{N}: Songuard attacks 1. If you have two or more composed notes, Songuard attacks 2 instead.

card.name: Soniclasm
card.text:
Artform: Music
When Soniclasm enters a field, you may trash one of your composed notes. If you do, it gains aggressive. (If it has aggressive, a creation can use an attack ability the turn it's played.) {A}{N}{N}: Soniclasm attacks 2.

card.name: Spectract
card.text:
Artform: Theater
{C}{C}: Spectract transcends 1. {T}{T}: Spectract attacks 1. Then if the attacked creation is still in play, put it into its owner's hand.

card.name: Squirius
card.text:
Artform: Writing
{A}I: Squirius transcends 1. Reserve the top card of your deck. {A}{A}II: Squirius transcends 2. Reserve the top card of your deck. {A}{A}I: Squirius attacks 1. Put a card from your reserves into your hand.

card.name: Squirrecord
card.text:
Artform: Music
{A}{N}: Squirrecord transcends 1. If you've stockpiled this turn, Squirrecord transcends 2 instead. {A}{N}: Squirrecord attacks 1.

card.name: Symphonor
card.text:
Artform: Music
As long as there are three or more mediums attached to Symphonor and you have four or more composed notes, abilities you use that would cause a creation you control to transcend require 1 less {N}. {A}{N}: Symphonor transcends 1. {A}{A}{A}{A}{N}{N}: Each of your creations transcends 1.

card.name: Temporage
card.text:
Artform: Music
{N}: Temporage transcends 1. Activate only if you have three or more composed notes. {N}: Temporage transcends 2. Activate only if you have six or more composed notes. {N}: Temporage attacks 1. Activate only if you have three or more composed notes.

card.name: Tragedeus
card.text:
Artform: Theater
When Tragedeus enters your field, trigger the start of turn abilities of each ComedyMask you control. {T}{T}{T}: Tragedeus attacks 1, then create a Comedeus token and move all Transcendence counters from Tragedeus to the created token. Destroy Tragedeus.

card.name: Tragedeus [Token] ARTF
card.text:
Artform: Theater
When Tragedeus enters your field, trigger the start of turn abilities of each ComedyMask you control. {T}{T}{T}: Tragedeus attacks 1, then create a Comedeus token and move all Transcendence counters from Tragedeus to the created token. Destroy Tragedeus.

card.name: Trebbletrash
card.text:
Artform: Music
{A}{A}{N}: Trash any number of your composed notes. Trebbletrash transcends X, where X is half the number of cards trashed this way, rounded down. {A}{N}: Trash any number of your composed notes. Trebbletrash attacks X, where X is half the number of cards trashed this way, rounded down.

card.name: Vampyre
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
{A}L: Vampyre transcends 1 and attacks 1. Discard a card.

card.name: Venumar
card.text:
Artform: Writing
{A}I: Venumar transcends 1. {A}{A}II: Venumar transcends 2. Attack Ability: {A}{A}I: Venumar attacks 1. Then if the attacked creation has no Transcendence counters on it, Venumar deals 1 damage to it.

card.name: Voidblade
card.text:
Artform: None
{A}{A}: Voidblade transcends 1. {A}{A}: Voidblade attacks 1. {A}{A}{A}{A}: Voidblade attacks 2.

card.name: Voidbrush
card.text:
Artform: None
{A}{A}: Voidbrush transcends 1. {A}{A}{A}{A}: Voidbrush transcends 2. {A}{A}: Voidbrush attacks 1.

card.name: Walkestalk
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
{A}LL: Walkestalk transcends 1 and attacks 1. {A}{A}LLL: Walkestalk transcends 2 and attacks 2.

card.name: Zombir
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
{A}{A}L: Zombir transcends 1 and attacks 1. {A}L: Zombir attacks 1.

card.name: Zombug
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
LL: Zombug transcends 1 and attacks 1. Then if this was the first transcend ability you've used this turn, destroy Zombug.

card.name: Earthbound
card.text:
Artform: None
Modifies creation Modified creation can't use abilities that would cause it to transcend.

card.name: Pacifism
card.text:
Artform: None
Modifies creation Modified creation can't use abilities that would cause it to attack.

card.name: Spirit Bounty
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
Play Spirit Bounty only if you control an Elixir. Modifies creation When modified creation perishes, draw two cards.

card.name: Stupor
card.text:
Artform: None
Modifies creation Modified creation's abilities require {A}{A} more to use. When Stupor is put into your discard pile from a field, draw a card.

card.name: Acid
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
Play Acid only if you control a Potion or Elixir. As a cost to play this card, discard a card. Destroy target non-spectral creation or modifier.

card.name: All the World's a Stage
card.text:
Artform: Theater
Reactive Play All the World's a Stage only if you control seven or more mediums. Each creation you control with a ComedyMask attached transcends 1. Each creation you control with a TragedyMask attached attacks 1.

card.name: Author's Vengeance
card.text:
Artform: Writing
Reactive Play Author's Vengeance only if you control two or more Inkwells. If a creation you control perished this turn, draw three cards.

card.name: Bassdrop
card.text:
Artform: Music
Play Bassdrop only if you control four or more mediums. Put three of your composed notes into your field. Destroy them at end of turn.

card.name: Battle Scene
card.text:
Artform: Theater
Play Battle Scene only if you control a TragedyMask. As a cost to play Battle Scene, remove two Transcendence counters from a creation you control. Each creation you control attacks 1.

card.name: Blasphemous Choice
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
Play Blasphemous Choice only if you control a Potion or Elixir. Each opponent destroys a creation they control.

card.name: Blunder
card.text:
Artform: None
Put the top four cards of your deck into your discard pile.

card.name: Bond Through Space
card.text:
Artform: None
As a cost to play Bond Through Space, discard a creation card. Search your deck for a creation card that doesn't share an artform with the discarded card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. If you've played a card named Bond Through Time this turn, you may put a creation card from your hand into your field with two Transcendence counters.

card.name: Bond Through Time
card.text:
Artform: None
As a cost to play Bond Through Time, discard a creation card. Put target creation card that doesn't share an artform with the discarded card from your discard pile into your hand. If you've played a card named Bond Through Space this turn, you may put a creation card from your hand into your field with two Transcendence counters.

card.name: Chains of the Void
card.text:
Artform: None
As a cost to play Chains of the Void, discard two cards. Search your deck for two modifier cards without costs, put them into your field attached to a creation you don't control, then shuffle.

card.name: Chaos Ritual
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
Play Chaos Ritual only if you control an Elixir. Each player discards two cards. Draw a card.

card.name: Crafty Composition
card.text:
Artform: Music
As a cost to play this card, reveal two MusicNote cards from your hand and reserve them. Draw three cards.

card.name: Drench in Ink
card.text:
Artform: Writing
Reactive Play Drench in Ink only if you control two or more Inkwells. Play Drench in Ink only if you control six or more Mediums. Target card being played is put into its owner's discard pile.

card.name: Duplicate
card.text:
Artform: None
Create a token that's a copy of target creation you control.

card.name: Exeunt
card.text:
Artform: Theater
Reactive Play Exeunt only if you control a ComedyMask and a TragedyMask. Put target creation you control and target creation you don't control into their owners' hands.

card.name: Expensive Research
card.text:
Artform: None
As a cost to play this card, put four cards from your reserve into your discard pile. Draw two cards.

card.name: Flare of Choice
card.text:
Artform: None
Choose an artform. Flare of Choice deals X damage to target non-spectral creation, where X is the number of creations and modifiers you control of the chosen artform.

card.name: Flare of Flexibility
card.text:
Artform: None
Flare of Flexibility deals 1 damage to target non-spectral creation for each artform among creations and modifiers you control.

card.name: Flare of Void
card.text:
Artform: None
Flare of Void deals X damage to target non-spectral creation, where X is the number of creations and modifiers you control without an artform.

card.name: Forbidden Knowledge
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
Play Forbidden Knowledge only if you control a Potion or Elixir. As a cost to play this card, destroy two creations you control. Draw three cards.

card.name: Gift of Ink
card.text:
Artform: Writing
Play Gift of Ink only if you control two or more Inkwells. Each player draws two cards.

card.name: Inferno
card.text:
Artform: None
Play Inferno only if you control four or more mediums. As a cost to play Inferno, put two mediums you control into your hand. Destroy all creatures.

card.name: Inkseep
card.text:
Artform: Writing
Reactive Play Inkseep only if you control two or more Inkwells. Play Inkseep only if you control four or more Mediums. Target non-Medium non-Creation card being played is put into its owner's discard pile. Draw a card.

card.name: Inksight
card.text:
Artform: Writing
Play Inksight only if you control two or more Inkwells. Play Inksight only if you control four or more Mediums. Draw two cards.

card.name: Interrupt
card.text:
Artform: Theater
Reactive Play Interrupt only if you control a ComedyMask and a TragedyMask. Detach up to three mediums from target creation.

card.name: Learn from Ink
card.text:
Artform: Writing
Play Learn from Ink only if you control two or more Inkwells. Draw two cards, then reserve a card from your hand.

card.name: March of the Undead
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
Play March of the Undead only if you control two or more Elixirs. Put each creation in your discard pile into your field.

card.name: Mask Crafting
card.text:
Artform: Theater
Play Mask Crafting only if you control five or more mediums. Put a Mask from your hand into your field.

card.name: Masquerade
card.text:
Artform: Theater
Play Masquerade only if you control three or more in any combination of ComedyMasks and TragedyMasks. Draw seven cards. Put any number of mediums from your hand into your field. Then, discard your hand.

card.name: Musical Stockpile
card.text:
Artform: Music
Reveal the top five cards of your deck. Reserve up to two MusicNote cards from among them and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in a random order. Then if no MusicNote cards were revealed this way, reserve the top card of your deck.

card.name: Negate
card.text:
Artform: None
Play Negate only if you control two or more mediums. As a cost to play Negate, discard a card. Target non-Medium card being played is put into its owner's discard pile.

card.name: Normalize
card.text:
Artform: None
Choose one — • Destroy target modifier. • Remove a Transcendence counter from target creation.

card.name: Obsessive Perfection
card.text:
Artform: Writing
Play Obsessive Perfection only if you control two or more Inkwells. Reserve the top card of your deck. If this is the fourth, eighth, or twelfth time a card you control named Obsessive Perfection has resolved this game, this card fully transcends.

card.name: Party Scene
card.text:
Artform: Theater
Play Party Scene only if you control a ComedyMask. As a cost to play Party Scene, remove two Transcendence counters from a creation you control. Each creation you control transcends 1.

card.name: Prevent
card.text:
Artform: None
Reactive As a cost to play Prevent, discard two cards. Target non-Medium card being played is put into its owner's discard pile.

card.name: Purchase Mediums
card.text:
Artform: None
As a cost to play this card, discard a card. Search your deck for up to two medium cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand.

card.name: Reanimate
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
Play Reanimate only if you control an Elixir. As a cost to play this card, discard a card. Put target creation from your discard pile into your field. It transcends 1.

card.name: Remix
card.text:
Artform: Music
Reserve two target MusicNote cards from your discard pile.

card.name: Retrieve
card.text:
Artform: None
Put two cards from your reserve into your hand.

card.name: Rhythmic Research
card.text:
Artform: Music
As a cost to play this card, trash three of your composed notes. Draw two cards.

card.name: Salve
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
Play Salve only if you control an Elixir. Put two cards of the same card type from your discard pile into your hand.

card.name: Search
card.text:
Artform: None
Look at the top three cards of your deck. Reserve one of them and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

card.name: Seek the Sound
card.text:
Artform: Music
Play Seek the Sound only if you've stockpiled this turn. Search your deck for a MusicNote card, reveal it, reserve it, then shuffle.

card.name: Sequence Fracture
card.text:
Artform: None
Reactive Rearrange the stack as you choose. (Cards or abilities on the stack can't target cards or abilities above them on the stack. If a card or ability with targets on the stack has no valid chosen targets, it is put into its owner's discard pile if it's a card or deleted if it's an ability.)

card.name: Siphon Through Ink
card.text:
Artform: Writing
Play Siphon Through Ink only if you control three or more Inkwells. Draw a card. Each opponent discards a card.

card.name: Sonic Boom
card.text:
Artform: Music
Sonic Boom deals 1 damage to target non-spectral creation for each of your composed notes.

card.name: Sonic Flare
card.text:
Artform: Music
As a cost to play this card, trash two of your composed notes. Sonic Flare deals 2 damage to target creation.

card.name: Stifle
card.text:
Artform: None
Reactive Play Stifle only if you control four or more mediums. Target non-Medium card being played is put into its owner's discard pile.

card.name: Stock Up
card.text:
Artform: None
Reserve the top two cards of your deck.

card.name: Studio Fire
card.text:
Artform: None
Studio Fire deals 1 damage to target creation for each medium attached to it.

card.name: The Great Mistake
card.text:
Artform: Alchemy
Play The Great Mistake only if you control two or more Elixirs. Put your deck into your discard pile. Void The Great Mistake.

card.name: The Ink Stares Back
card.text:
Artform: Writing
As a cost to play this card, discard three cards and destroy a creation you control. Search your deck for up to five Inkwell cards, put them into your field, then shuffle. They can't be attached this turn.

card.name: Trickery
card.text:
Artform: None
Reactive Up to two target creations can't use attack or transcend abilities this turn.

card.name: Troupe Call
card.text:
Artform: Theater
Play Troupe Call only if you control two or more ComedyMasks and two or more TragedyMasks. Put a Mask from your hand into your field.

card.name: Ultimate Rhythm
card.text:
Artform: Music
Play Ultimate Rhythm only if you control four or more MusicNotes. Reserve any number of MusicNote cards in your discard pile.

card.name: Unmanifest
card.text:
Artform: Theater
Reactive Play Unmanifest only if you control four or more in any combination of ComedyMasks and TragedyMasks. Put target creation into its owner's hand.

card.name: Wisdom
card.text:
Artform: None
Play Wisdom only if you control three or more mediums. Look at the top five cards of your deck and put them back in any order. You may shuffle. Draw a card.
